_comment: Gmail scan config. Used by scripts/scan-gmail.py and the Phase 2 Gmail processing step of the morning routine. Customize before running — see docs/google-workspace-setup.md.
description: Gmail scan config. Defines what to surface, what to skip, and how to route email content.

the_daily._comment: Example: newsletter from your corporate internal communications team. Adjust 'from' and 'subject_contains' to match yours.
the_daily.action: Extract corp announcements, certifications, deadlines, events. Write to daily note.
the_daily.parse_note: HTML-only — no text/plain part. Strip HTML tags with regex before extracting content.

workday_tasks._comment: Example: your HR system sender (Workday, BambooHR, etc.). Pending approvals are time-sensitive — treat as commitments.
workday_tasks.action: Surface pending approvals and action items. Flag as commitments if time-sensitive.

employee_success._comment: Example: HR announcements about team milestones/anniversaries. Cross-reference names to your people/ files.
employee_success.action: Surface work anniversaries and milestones for your direct reports and extended team. Good for 1:1 openers and shoutouts.
employee_success.people_match: Cross-reference names against people/ files and people/00-ORG.md

direct_emails.description: Emails from real people (not systems) that mention your org, products, or team members
direct_emails.action: Surface with sender context. Extract entity intel if relevant.

skip_senders.description: Always skip these senders — covered elsewhere or noise

skip_subjects.description: Skip emails matching these subject patterns

output.format: Group by: Action Required > People/Team > FYI. Include sender, subject, one-line summary. Link entity intel to appropriate files.
output.commitment_extraction: Same rules as Slack: ⭐ COMMIT: → Active Board, ⏳ WAITING: → Active Board
